name: Muffins (Using Biscuit Mix)
recipeInstructions:
8 Muffins
135 Calories per Muffin
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly grease muffin tins.
3. Combine biscuit mix and sugar in a bowl.
4. In another bowl, whisk together water and egg. Add this mixture to the biscuit mix and sugar; stir until just combined. The batter will be lumpy.
5. Fill each muffin tin about two-thirds full with batter.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
